brief_justification: Arrives at exactly 188 mg-equivalents with valid step-by-step kinetic reasoning; explicitly tracks both drug and metabolite compartments separately showing one level beyond surface but no second-order effects or deeper analysis; proceeds linearly through arithmetic without reflecting on the reasoning method or potential misinterpretations of the problem; work is shown in a table enabling implicit verification but no explicit sanity check or re-derivation from an alternative angle; notes API unavailability and graceful degradation but treats the mathematical result as certain without acknowledging discrete vs. continuous metabolization assumptions; considers only one computational approach with no alternatives mentioned or evaluated; every intermediate value is shown in the table with full derivation reproducible by a third party; the Bayesian negative gate is irrelevant to this arithmetic task so the agent neither exhibits nor explicitly addresses it, defaulting to avoidance; the purely deductive single-method calculation falls into the suppressed 'deductive only' and 'single hypothesis lock' failure modes; the injected topology is a Bayesian inference graph with branches and gates that the agent completely ignores, following a flat linear arithmetic path instead.
